PANEL.TITLE: Notifications
PANEL.EMPTY: You don't have any notifications yet.
PANEL.EMPTY_UNREAD: All caught up! No new notifications.
PANEL.PUSH_ERROR: Couldn't enable notifications. Please try again.

NEW_APPOINTMENT_REQUEST.TITLE: New appointment received
NEW_APPOINTMENT_REQUEST.MESSAGE: {{customerName}} requested a booking for {{serviceName}} on {{scheduledDate}} at {{scheduledTime}}.

APPOINTMENT_CONFIRMED.TITLE: Appointment confirmed
APPOINTMENT_CONFIRMED.MESSAGE: Your appointment for {{serviceName}} has been confirmed by the provider.

APPOINTMENT_REJECTED.TITLE: Appointment declined
APPOINTMENT_REJECTED.MESSAGE: The provider declined your appointment for {{serviceName}}.

PROVIDER_CANCELLED.TITLE: Appointment cancelled by provider
PROVIDER_CANCELLED.MESSAGE: The provider cancelled your appointment for {{serviceName}}.

APPOINTMENT_REMINDER.TITLE: Your appointment is coming up
APPOINTMENT_REMINDER.MESSAGE: You have an appointment for {{serviceName}} {{scheduledDay}} at {{scheduledTime}}.

APPOINTMENT_COMPLETED.TITLE: Service completed
APPOINTMENT_COMPLETED.MESSAGE: Your booking for {{serviceName}} has been completed. Rate the provider!

PAYMENT_FAILED.TITLE: Payment not approved
PAYMENT_FAILED.MESSAGE: We couldn't confirm the payment for your {{serviceName}} booking. Please try again.

PAYMENT_PENDING_PROVIDER.TITLE: Payment pending
PAYMENT_PENDING_PROVIDER.MESSAGE: Payment for {{customerName}}'s booking of {{serviceName}} hasn't been completed yet.

RESCHEDULE_REQUESTED.TITLE: Reschedule requested
RESCHEDULE_REQUESTED.MESSAGE: There's a new reschedule proposal for {{serviceName}}.

RESCHEDULE_ACCEPTED.TITLE: Reschedule accepted
RESCHEDULE_ACCEPTED.MESSAGE: Your reschedule request for {{serviceName}} was accepted.

RESCHEDULE_REJECTED.TITLE: Reschedule declined
RESCHEDULE_REJECTED.MESSAGE: Your reschedule request for {{serviceName}} was declined.
